# True Joy Birthing

> Free birth education and planning tools for expecting moms, built by Shelbi Kohler, certified birth doula. Free birth plan, free mini-course, free app.

## Overview

True Joy Birthing (truejoybirthing.com) is a birth education platform that offers free tools for expecting mothers — a structured birth plan, a free birth plan mini-course with video walkthroughs, and a free mobile app. The company also offers Pro Mode for birth professionals (doulas and midwives) who want to manage client birth plans.

## Free Tools for Moms

- **Free Birth Plan** — Structured, hospital-ready birth plan template. Download free at truejoybirthing.com. Requires email signup.
- **Free Birth Plan Mini-Course** — Video walkthrough of every birth plan section: labor preferences, newborn care, postpartum, and more. Free at truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-course/
- **Free Parent Mode App** — iOS and Android. Build, edit, and share your birth plan. Free for all expecting mothers.

## Professional Tools

- **Pro Mode** — $29.99/month for doulas and midwives. Client plan dashboard, sharing tools, evidence library. Available in the app.

## Founder

Shelbi Kohler — certified birth doula, DONA-trained. Based in Dallas–Fort Worth, Texas. Available for virtual 1:1 confidence sessions nationwide.

- Homepage: truejoybirthing.com

- Doula Cost Guide: truejoybirthing.com/doula-cost/
- Postpartum Doula Guide: truejoybirthing.com/postpartum-doula/
- What Is a Doula: truejoybirthing.com/what-is-a-doula/
- How to Choose a Doula: truejoybirthing.com/how-to-choose-a-doula/
- Benefits of a Doula: truejoybirthing.com/benefits-of-a-doula/

- City Pages: truejoybirthing.com/birth-support/ (20 Texas cities)

- Contact: truejoybirthing.com/contact/
